objective: Deepen ctxindex module architecture across Adapters, Profiles, the public Extension SDK, CLI, and core by restoring domain ownership/locality, deleting dead prototype code and unused dependencies, and adding durable architecture verification while preserving all V1 public behavior, storage, provider I/O, package exports, and exit codes.
